results.description: THE U.S. ARMY CORPS OF ENGINEERS, MEMPHIS DISTRICT ON BEHALF OF THE MARINE DESIGN CENTER (MDC), IS PROCURING A STEEL-HULLED DECK BARGE. THE BARGE WILL BE USED AS A LANDING BARGE TO SUPPORT THE ENSLEY ENGINEER YARD (EEY) IN MEMPHIS, TENNESSEE.
